mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOM1_CD AS custom1, ENTITY_CD AS custom2, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) AS year, ACCOUNT_CD AS account, SUM(Q1) AS q1, SUM(Q2) AS q2, SUM(Q3) AS q3, SUM(Q4) AS q4, SUM(YEARTOTAL) AS yeartotal FROM DATAINTEGRATION.VIEW_BUDGET_TO_CONTROL WHERE (ACCOUNT_CD LIKE 'A01030301%' OR ACCOUNT_CD LIKE 'A01040102%') AND PROJECT_CD = 'P00' AND CUSTOM2_CD = 'CU200' AND YEARS_NM IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(YEARS_NM) >= 4 AND SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 1, 2) = 'FY' AND '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) = #{year} GROUP BY CUSTOM1_CD, ENTITY_CD, ACCOUNT_CD, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) ORDER BY ENTITY_CD, ACCOUNT_CD

SELECT ENTITY_CD AS custom2, CUSTOM2_CD AS custom3, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) AS year, ACCOUNT_CD AS account, SUM(Q1) AS q1, SUM(Q2) AS q2, SUM(Q3) AS q3, SUM(Q4) AS q4, SUM(YEARTOTAL) AS yeartotal FROM DATAINTEGRATION.VIEW_BUDGET_TO_CONTROL WHERE ACCOUNT_CD = 'A01030112' AND PROJECT_CD = 'P00' AND CUSTOM2_CD LIKE 'CU205%' AND YEARS_NM IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(YEARS_NM) >= 4 AND SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 1, 2) = 'FY' AND '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) = #{year} GROUP BY ENTITY_CD, CUSTOM2_CD, ACCOUNT_CD, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) ORDER BY ENTITY_CD, CUSTOM2_CD

SELECT ENTITY_CD AS custom2, CUSTOM2_CD AS custom3, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) AS year, ACCOUNT_CD AS account, SUM(Q1) AS q1, SUM(Q2) AS q2, SUM(Q3) AS q3, SUM(Q4) AS q4, SUM(YEARTOTAL) AS yeartotal FROM DATAINTEGRATION.VIEW_BUDGET_TO_CONTROL WHERE ACCOUNT_CD = 'A010301150102' AND PROJECT_CD = 'P00' AND CUSTOM2_CD LIKE 'CU205%' AND YEARS_NM IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(YEARS_NM) >= 4 AND SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 1, 2) = 'FY' AND '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) = #{year} GROUP BY ENTITY_CD, CUSTOM2_CD, ACCOUNT_CD, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) ORDER BY ENTITY_CD, CUSTOM2_CD

SELECT ENTITY_CD AS custom2, PROJECT_CD AS project, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) AS year, ACCOUNT_CD AS account, SUM(Q1) AS q1, SUM(Q2) AS q2, SUM(Q3) AS q3, SUM(Q4) AS q4, SUM(YEARTOTAL) AS yeartotal FROM DATAINTEGRATION.VIEW_BUDGET_TO_CONTROL WHERE ACCOUNT_CD = 'A010301150102' AND (PROJECT_CD IS NULL OR PROJECT_CD != 'P00') AND YEARS_NM IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(YEARS_NM) >= 4 AND SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 1, 2) = 'FY' AND '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) = #{year} GROUP BY ENTITY_CD, PROJECT_CD, PROJECT_ID, ACCOUNT_CD, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) ORDER BY ENTITY_CD, PROJECT_CD

SELECT ENTITY_CD AS custom2, PROJECT_CD AS project, PROJECT_ID AS projectId, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) AS year, ACCOUNT_CD AS account, SUM(BEGBALANCE) AS yeartotal FROM DATAINTEGRATION.VIEW_BUDGET_TO_CONTROL_TZE WHERE ACCOUNT_CD = 'A01030115010102' AND YEARS_NM IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(YEARS_NM) >= 4 AND SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 1, 2) = 'FY' AND '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) = #{year} GROUP BY ENTITY_CD, PROJECT_CD, PROJECT_ID, ACCOUNT_CD, '20' || SUBSTR(YEARS_NM, 3) ORDER BY ENTITY_CD, PROJECT_CD
